f_rev_05.name: reversal_zscore_combo
f_rev_05.description: 时序zscore标准化后相乘的反转×换手率因子

admission.notes: 10y BT 2016-2026: Detailed Sharpe -0.14, MDD -60.87%, Alpha -5.08%, 2017-2018 -41%/-20% 单边下行严重亏损; cross-sectional IC 强(t-stat 25)但当前 top-50 周频策略形态吃不下成本(年化换手 65×, fees 55% of initial)
